mapper.sql: br.id, br.reader_id, br.book_id, br.status, br.request_note, br.reject_reason, br.processed_by, br.processed_at, br.created_at, br.updated_at, br.deleted, r.username as reader_username, r.full_name as reader_full_name, b.title as book_title, b.author as book_author, b.isbn as book_isbn, o.username as operator_username
mapper.insert: insert into borrow_requests(reader_id, book_id, status, request_note, reject_reason, processed_by, processed_at, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{book.id}, #{status}, #{requestNote}, #{rejectReason}, #{processedBy.id}, #{processedAt}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.select: select from borrow_requests br join users r on br.reader_id = r.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join users o on br.processed_by = o.id where br.id = #{id} and br.deleted = false

select from borrow_requests br join users r on br.reader_id = r.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join users o on br.processed_by = o.id where br.reader_id = #{readerId} and br.deleted = false order by br.id desc

select from borrow_requests br join users r on br.reader_id = r.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join users o on br.processed_by = o.id where br.deleted = false and br.status = 'PENDING' order by br.id asc

select from borrow_requests br join users r on br.reader_id = r.id join books b on br.book_id = b.id left join users o on br.processed_by = o.id where br.deleted = false and br.status = #{status} order by br.id asc
mapper.update: update borrow_requests set status = #{status}, request_note = #{requestNote}, reject_reason = #{rejectReason}, processed_by = #{processedBy.id}, processed_at = #{processedAt}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
